case_title: Financial services complaint progressing through oversight stages
decision_trigger: Complaint escalation through financial oversight structures.
recall_question: What escalation signals and institutional behaviour patterns appear across the case lifecycle?
desired_outcome: Maintain accurate record of oversight stages and institutional responses.
rules_or_procedures: Financial Services and Pensions Ombudsman complaint procedures
Legal Services Review internal review procedures
European Parliament PETI petition admissibility procedures

actors.name: Citizen complainant
actors.likely_behaviour: maintain evidence record and escalate where appropriate

actors.name: Financial Services and Pensions Ombudsman
actors.role_in_case: initial complaint handling and escalation assessment
actors.incentive_or_pressure: apply regulatory process and jurisdictional rules
actors.likely_behaviour: progress complaint through defined oversight stages

actors.name: European Parliament PETI Secretariat
actors.role_in_case: petition review at EU institutional level
actors.incentive_or_pressure: apply petition admissibility and closure procedures
actors.likely_behaviour: review documentation and determine petition status

evidence_bundle.label: Complaint escalation record
evidence_bundle.relevance: Shows complaint progression to legal services review stage
evidence_bundle.linked_timeline_label: Complaint progressed to Legal Services Review

evidence_bundle.label: Reference model shared
evidence_bundle.relevance: Demonstrates analytical framework shared during correspondence period
evidence_bundle.linked_timeline_label: Reference model for auditable decision pipelines shared

evidence_bundle.label: Correspondence acknowledgement
evidence_bundle.relevance: Confirms complaint acknowledged and awaiting investigation

timeline.label: Complaint progressed to Legal Services Review
timeline.description: Complaint progressed to Legal Services Review by the Financial Services and Pensions Ombudsman.

timeline.label: Reference model for auditable decision pipelines shared
timeline.description: Reference model shared while awaiting institutional correspondence.

timeline.label: Correspondence acknowledged
timeline.description: Complaint acknowledged and confirmed as awaiting investigation.

escalation_paths.name: Ombudsman legal services review
escalation_paths.trigger: Complaint progressed to legal services review stage
escalation_paths.likely_response: Internal legal assessment of complaint merits

escalation_paths.name: EU petition review
escalation_paths.trigger: Petition submitted to EU oversight body
escalation_paths.likely_response: Admissibility review and institutional closure decision

structural_insight: Institutional responses follow formal procedural pathways with acknowledgement and staged review processes.
personal_positioning: The complainant maintains a documented record of escalation stages across institutions.
decision_note: Continue documenting institutional responses and maintain structured case chronology.
learning_capture: Escalation across multiple oversight bodies introduces procedural stages that shape institutional response timelines.
